title: compressor operation
description: Operation block of a credo-pure gas-phase compressor.  Hardware-only: specify the shaft power W_shaft (W or kW, positive) and the isentropic efficiency eta.  The discharge pressure P_out, the discharge temperature T_out and the compression ratio are RESULTS computed from the isentropic-then-efficiency energy balance.  For 'I need P_out = X' wrap the unit in a DesignSpec outerDict that manipulates $W_shaft with a target on this unit's P_out KPI.

W_shaft.title: Shaft power (hardware)
W_shaft.description: Mechanical power delivered to the gas.  Think of it as the motor rating.  Positive (this is a compressor; use a turbine block for expansion).

eta.title: Isentropic efficiency
eta.description: Machine characteristic: w_isentropic / w_real.  0 < eta <= 1.  Lower eta means more of the shaft work is dissipated as heat (entropy generation) rather than compression.
